hero.label: Made for Truewind
hero.headline: I want to build growth at Truewind alongside Alex Lee.
hero.subheadline: Truewind is solving a real pain point for startups: investor-ready financials at the speed of growth. You've hit 100+ customers in under two years with AI-powered accounting that actually works. I'm ready to help you acquire the next wave.

whyCompany.title: You're solving bookkeeping for founders who hate spreadsheets
whyCompany.body: Most startup founders dread financial statements. Truewind removes that friction with AI that actually understands startup accounting. I've watched businesses get bogged down in admin work. A 10x better experience here means happier customers, faster growth, and a clear go-to-market story I can sell on day one.

whyCompany.title: 15 people, 100 customers, 17M raised. You're in hypergrowth mode.
whyCompany.body: YC W23 backing. Trusted by accounting firms like EisnerAmper and Frank Rimerman. You're not a concept anymore; you're a proven product with real traction and real customers. This is the moment where having a sharp BDR on the team makes the difference between 200 customers and 400.

whyCompany.title: I've already done this dance. I know how to fill your funnel.
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I ran cold outreach that converted to 15-20 paying clients using LinkedIn sequences and HubSpot. At NextAfter, I saw how B2B sales cycles work in the tech space. I'm not learning BDR; I'm bringing it here. I know how to find the founders and accounting firms who need Truewind.

quote: I've already proven I can fill a pipeline and close conversations. I want to do that for a product I actually believe in, at a company moving at this speed.
